name: Vanguard's Visage
description: Notes When used, the Vanguard’s Visage shoots a large sword-shaped set of bullets, each doing 150 armor-piercing damage. Very similar to the Bridge Sentinel’s own sword attack, it is practically impossible to hit every shot.

stats.range: 4.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) tiles Shot Range: 5.175 tiles

effects: On party: Berserk for 3 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds Eternal Defender: Fires a sword of projectiles towards your cursor Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
